title: thaumic_funnel
description: Thaumic Tinkerer modifications for use with jars with a capacity greater than 250, Like thaumic additions jars ( Mithrillium,Adaminite ...) and enhancements to facilitate automation.
body:
## Thaumic Funnel

This Minecraft mod is a modification of Thaumic Tinkerer.

It allows the use of jars with a capacity greater than 250, such as Thaumic Additions jars (Mithrillium jar…), and includes enhancements to facilitate automation.

## Features included:

**Essence Level Measurement**: The essence level in the jar can now be measured with a comparator, allowing for detection when it has been completely emptied or filled.

**Redstone Signal Transfer**: Applying a redstone signal to the funnel will now transfer its contents to the hopper located beneath it, allowing you to replace the jar with another.
Direct Filling and Emptying: The jar on the funnel can be filled and emptied directly with pipes or with the Essentia Transfuser and Filling Essentia Transfuser. It can also be filled or emptied with phials.

**Essentia Meter block**: This displays the essence of the associated hopper. It can be labeled. You can change the scale (each scale corresponds to a color) by hand to get a visual representation of the stored quantity. This feature automates the jar change when it’s empty or full, eliminating the need to create a redstone circuit.
 

**In conclusion**: with a sufficient number of jars that feed the system with a funnel, it can act as an ‘Infinite jar’.

Enjoy your Thaumic funnel.
